Name: POLYBIUS - The Video Game That Doesn't Exist
Making ‘Mr. Robot’
Review:
I’m using this Letterboxd film to rate the series as a whole. 

The final three episodes should be watched closely together, perhaps even in one sitting if you don’t have a bladder like mine. I had real tears, feeling the finality in the line, “I want you to know, I love you.” Everything is cinematic, and I love Sam Esmail’s creative streak in the visual storytelling he does as the show runner.

M83’s “Outro” is used to perfection here. 

This was my first time watching MR ROBOT since it concluded with its fourth season back in 2019. I highly recommend it.
